Thanks for contributing to MBII Foundry!
Keep the checklist below as-is; tick the boxes that apply.
-->

## What this changes
<!-- One or two sentences. -->

## Why
<!-- Link an issue (`Closes #123`) or describe the motivation. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] The change is focused — one feature/fix per PR
- [ ] I tested locally (`./setup_mbii-foundry.sh && ./run_mbii-foundry.sh` or opened the affected file in the app)
- [ ] I ran `go vet ./...` and saw no new warnings
- [ ] Documentation updated if user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] If this is a **definitions change**, I followed [`docs/DEFINITIONS_GUIDE.md`](../docs/DEFINITIONS_GUIDE.md) — verified against in-game behavior or the wiki, not just AI output

## Testing notes
<!-- How did you verify this works? Screenshots for UI changes are welcome. -->
